title: TatarDelight
body:
![Tatar delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ac4a6bec66afe8c612f7cd137b82cdcebbcd4ad.png)TatarDelight is an addon for Farmer's Delight that adds various traditional dishes of the Tatarstan. (Such dishes are currently in development:Chuck chuck, Bales, tea with milk) The mod adds:

-Echpochmak
